steps.summary: Opened docs/horizons/firm-facing-poc-brief.md and phases/firm-facing-poc-brief with PB1~PB4. ROADMAP/OBJECTIVE were moved from waiting state to active firm-facing-poc-brief.

Wrote docs/reports/firm-facing-poc/2026-07-05-poc-brief.md. It targets F-ACC first, F-AUD second, and covers team context, problem, current proof, demo path, risk boundary, expected PoC output, and PoC ask.

Created docs/reports/firm-facing-poc/2026-07-05-one-page-brief.md and docs/reports/firm-facing-poc/INDEX.md for meeting use. The one-pager separates 10-minute introduction and 30-minute demo flow, and keeps PoC asks to three items.

Closed firm-facing-poc-brief with docs/reports/2026-07-05-pb4-firm-facing-poc-brief-close-report.md. toolkit_readiness ok True, quality_preflight ok/public_safe True, git diff --check exit 0 with LF->CRLF warnings only.
